def negative_python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_nested_membership_scan_without_set():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_nested_membership_scan_without_set"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag nested membership checks over lists where a set or dict index should be built once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
